message:
fix: remove spurious @ prefix from abstract socket IPC pattern

The `find_matches` method strips the leading `@` from socket paths
before comparing against `path_prefix`, but the dbus pattern included
`@` in its prefix. This meant abstract socket matching (e.g.,
`@/tmp/dbus-*`) could never succeed. Remove the `@` from the pattern
so the prefix comparison works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
